ModMetaData.name: RimTalk - Reality Sync
ModMetaData.author: qqqq819_01
ModMetaData.description:
Adds real-world time, date, weather, and save data variables to RimTalk. Try breaking the fourth wall and let your colonists sense the reality you live in.
[h1]Key Features:[/h1] - 🕒 Real-Time Sync: Colonists will know the exact current time and date of your real world. - 🌤️ Live Weather API: Supports OpenWeatherMap and HeWeather (QWeather). - 🍂 Seasonal Fallback: Playing offline or don't want to configure an API key? The mod will automatically simulate realistic seasonal weather based on the current real-world month. - 💾 Save Time Awareness: Colonists can comment on how much time has passed since your last save/play session.
[h1]Available Prompt Variables:[/h1] {{ rs_RealTime }}, {{ rs_RealDate }}, {{ rs_RealWeather }}, {{ rs_RealTemperature }}, {{ rs_RealHumidity }}, {{ rs_RealLocation }}, {{ rs_LastSaveTime }}, {{ rs_RealSaveDiff }}, etc.
[h1]Supported Languages:[/h1] - English - Simplified Chinese (简体中文) - Traditional Chinese (繁體中文) - Korean (한국어)
* Powered by Harmony. Clean code, safe to add or remove from existing saves at any time.
------------------------------------------------
为RimTalk增加了现实世界的时间、日期、天气和存档数据变量。可以试着打破第四面墙，让你的殖民者感知到你所处的现实。
[h1]主要功能:[/h1] - 🕒 现实时间同步：殖民者将知道你现实世界中当前的准确时间和日期。 - 🌤️ 实时天气 API：支持 OpenWeatherMap 和 和风天气 (QWeather)。 - 🍂 节气/季节保底：离线游玩或者不想配置 API 密钥？Mod 会根据现实世界的当前月份，自动为你模拟出符合真实季节的天气。 - 💾 存档时间感知：殖民者可以吐槽距离你上一次存档/游玩已经过去了多长时间。
[h1]可用提示词变量 (Variables):[/h1] {{ rs_RealTime }}, {{ rs_RealDate }}, {{ rs_RealWeather }}, {{ rs_RealTemperature }}, {{ rs_RealHumidity }}, {{ rs_RealLocation }}, {{ rs_LastSaveTime }}, {{ rs_RealSaveDiff }} 等等。
[h1]支持语言:[/h1] - 简体中文 - 繁體中文 - 英语 - 韩语 (한국어)
* 基于 Harmony 驱动。代码纯净，支持在现有存档中随时安全地添加或移除。
